name: Non-Standard Port C2 Traffic
description: Detects outbound connections on non-standard ports that may indicate C2
query:
// Non-Standard Port C2 Detection
// HTTP/HTTPS traffic on unusual ports
events from ndr_flow
where direction = "outbound"
  and application_protocol in ("HTTP", "HTTPS")
  and destination_port not in (80, 443, 8080, 8443)
group by source_ip, destination_ip, destination_port
having count(*) > 10
within 300 seconds
